svg.text: SIDE ELEVATION — CUT-AWAY — SELENE-S — OPEN TRACK (NOT TO SCALE)
3-PHASE LSM · WINDING A C' B A' C B' · tau = 1.2 m · ALL COILS 20 K · FIELD CLASS 20-30 T
VERY EARLY CONCEPT MOCK-UP — TEST DESIGN — NOT TO SCALE

g.text: 1. EARLY CONCEPT ILLUSTRATION — NOT TO SCALE.
2. ALL COILS AT 20 K · FIELD CLASS 20-30 T.
3. EACH COIL: OWN LOOP, CRYO BRANCH + QUENCH DUMP.
4. WINDING A C' B A' C B' — tau = 1.2 m, WAVE 2.4 m.
5. BORE OPEN TO VACUUM. NO TUBE. NO DOORS.
6. POD: KICK STAGE + EXPANDED CARGO BAY + FAIRING.

svg.text: 20 K closed He loop · heat banked over 14-day lunar day
regolith ~250 K constant below 2 m — natural cold buffer
PAYLOAD POD Ø1.6 m — EXPANDED CARGO BAY — POLES N·S·N @ tau = 1.2 m
kick stage (Isp 350 s) · 4 modules on rails — 3.6 m cargo bay · blunt dust fairing
NOMINAL 10 m SECTION (drawn not to scale) — 25 COILS @ 0.4 m — sections share the cryoplant
construction mirrors SPARC-class fusion TF coils
the film is microns — the MAGNET is not:
~320 turns of tape stack into a winding pack ~ 8 × 10 cm
one loop · one cryo branch · one dump
CONFIG A — UP TO 4 STD MODULES
right cap = dust fairing — blunt, no aero
modules lock to rails — mix freely

g.text: SELENE-S LSM — 10 m OPEN TRACK SECTION
